title: Super Flower Leadex 2800W ATX 3.1 power supply review: Top-notch build quality, exceptional efficiency
summary: The Super Flower Leadex 2800W power supply boasts top-notch build quality and exceptional efficiency, but at an extreme price.
insight: Unparalleled efficiency and quality in a high-end power supply solution.

title: Researchers identify people through ordinary Wi-Fi routers with 99.5% accuracy technique works with standard Wi-Fi routers
summary: Researchers have developed a technique to identify individuals using standard Wi-Fi routers with 99.5% accuracy without any specialized hardware or access to the target network.
insight: Mass surveillance through public Wi-Fi is now a major concern

title: Drone breaks world speed record with 453 mph in test run exotic sawtooth carbon fiber propeller blades one of the key advances in the Blackbird design
summary: A YouTuber duo unofficially broke the world speed record with a drone reaching 453 mph, using a custom-made carbon fiber propeller with exotic sawtooth leading edges. The first test ended in a crash at 393 mph. The design's potential for high-speed flight is being explored.
insight: Advancements in drone design push boundaries of speed and innovation.

title: After $2.5 billion Supermicro smuggling bust, Nvidia CEO urges company to fix export control compliance Taiwan also begins to crack down on AI GPU chip smuggling to China
summary: Nvidia CEO Huang emphasizes compliance with U.S. trade rules after a smuggling bust. Taiwan starts to crack down on AI GPU chip smuggling. Nvidia insists its partners follow U.S. trade regulations.
insight: Export control compliance is crucial for global tech companies' reputation.

title: First ever Cray T3D Supercomputer goes up for auction with $81,000 reserve Europe s fastest supercomputer in June 1996 goes on the block
summary: The first Cray T3D supercomputer, serial number 6001, is up for auction with a $81,000 reserve. The supercomputer, Europe's fastest in June 1996, is a piece of computing history. Potential buyers can submit opening bids from $60,000.
insight: Historic computing technology up for sale to the highest bidder.

title: Steam Machine appears in Vulkan s conformant product database upcoming Valve console is certified compliant with the graphics API
summary: The Steam Machine has been added to the Vulkan conformant product database. This indicates that the console meets the graphics API standard. The certification is a step towards a potential release.
insight: Vulkan certification is a crucial step for Steam Machine's market readiness.

title: We tested Advanced Shader Delivery on the RX 9070 XT in six games up to 95% improvement in load times and 33 percent faster 1% Low FPS
summary: We tested Advanced Shader Delivery in six games, achieving significant improvements in load times and 1% Low FPS.
insight: Faster game loading and smoother low-FPS performance enhance the overall gaming experience.

title: Ubisoft reportedly testing generative AI in Far Cry 7, insider says it 'looks like sh*t' company recently posted a record 1.3 billion loss
summary: Ubisoft is testing generative AI in Far Cry 7, but results are reportedly poor.
insight: Ubisoft's AI integration risks may impact Far Cry 7's quality and success.

title: Researcher develops 'spray-on' stealth coating for drones volcanic rock formulation claims to reduce radar return signals by up to 43dB, compared to 20 to 30dB for typical radar absorbent material
summary: A researcher has developed a 'spray-on' stealth coating for drones that significantly reduces radar return signals, enhancing their survivability in contested skies.
insight: Enhanced drone survivability in contested skies with improved stealth technology.

title: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro Review: Comfortable, but that's it
summary: The Autonomous ErgoChair Pro offers good back support and adjustability, but lacks standout features.
insight: Competitive market demands unique features for office chairs to stand out.

title: Electronics buff hand-draws and etches custom PCBs at home functional home-etched PCB runs a 3D-printed fume extractor fan
summary: A maker has developed a hand-drawn and etched PCB process at home, using a 3D-printed fume extractor fan to create functional and unique printed circuit boards.
insight: Custom PCBs empower makers to design and build without mass production constraints.

title: New video of melted Bambu Lab A1 sparks debate about whether the 3D printer is still a fire hazard critics push for recall while redditors suspect external factors
summary: Bambu Lab's A1 3D printer has been involved in another incident, with a user posting a video of a melted printer on Instagram. The footage shows significant damage to the printer's side, but the cause remains unclear. The incident has sparked debate and calls for a recall.
insight: Safety concerns and recalls may damage Bambu Lab's reputation

title: Cyberpunk 2077 cosplay jacket features a $1,200 flexible OLED collar that you can game on with a Steam Controller dual Raspberry Pi 4s power the wearable tech
summary: A cosplay enthusiast created a Cyberpunk 2077 jacket with a flexible OLED collar, featuring a dual Raspberry Pi 4 power source and integration with a Steam Controller for gaming capabilities.
insight: Advancements in wearable tech blur lines between gaming and real-life fashion.

title: Commercial satellite supplying intel to Ukraine is cornered by four Russian spacecraft US Space Force can only watch as Russia threatens 'quasi-civilian' targets
summary: Russian spacecraft are maneuvering near a US-European radar satellite in Ukraine, raising concerns about fuel consumption and intentions. The satellite is used for reconnaissance missions, supplying intel to Ukraine. Russia's actions are seen as a threat to 'quasi-civilian' targets.
insight: Russian satellite maneuvers may be a precursor to a space-based attack capability

title: Khadas Mind Graphics 2 review A powerful NVIDIA Geforce RTX 5060 Ti eGPU dock for the Mind 2 mini PC
summary: The Khadas Mind Graphics 2 dock is reviewed with the Mind 2 mini PC, featuring an NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060 Ti GPU. The review tests the dock's features, including 2.5GbE networking, speakers, and microphone array. The Mind 2 mini PC with the dock is tested running Windows 11.
insight: Powerful eGPU dock unlocks high-end gaming and AI capabilities

title: Monitor live traffic from V2X signals with V2X2MAP open-source Android app and an ESP32-C5 development board
summary: The V2X2MAP Android app, paired with an ESP32-C5 board, enables monitoring live traffic from V2X signals, leveraging 802.11p/ITS-G5 communication and GPS capabilities on recent Android smartphones.
insight: Real-time traffic monitoring using V2X signals on Android devices.

title: Was Ray Tracing a Scam?
summary: Eight years after Nvidia's promise, most gamers disable ray tracing due to performance issues.
insight: Performance costs overshadowed ray tracing's promised gaming revolution.

title: HP BIOS updates are bricking premium laptops through Windows Update
summary: HP BIOS updates through Windows Update are bricking some premium laptops, causing boot issues and freezing. Similar complaints have appeared online, describing the same kind of problems after installing recent BIOS updates. This has left affected users with non-functional devices.
insight: Faulty BIOS updates can render high-end laptops useless permanently.

title: This $82 USB cable hides a Wi-Fi microcontroller inside its connector
summary: A Kickstarter device packs a Wi-Fi microcontroller inside a standard-looking USB cable, challenging the typical assumption of what a USB cable can do.
insight: Hiding computing power in everyday objects expands possibilities for IoT applications.

title: Tesla's Cybercab just became the most efficient EV ever built
summary: Tesla's Cybercab achieves record-breaking efficiency, surpassing all previous EVs.
insight: Revolutionizing transportation with unprecedented energy efficiency and reduced emissions.

title: This wearable $2,000 AI exoskeleton wants to turn your legs into hybrid hardware
summary: A $2,000 AI exoskeleton enhances leg movement with dual hip-mounted motors, adding force to each step. The system uses carbon-fiber linkages and hinged braces for stability. This wearable technology aims to turn legs into hybrid hardware.
insight: Revolutionizing mobility with AI-powered leg enhancement technology advancements.
